title: Travel Insurance
description: Schengen-compliant travel insurance guidance for Indian travellers.

items.title: Schengen Travel Insurance
items.description: Mandatory for the visa application — must cover at least €30,000 for medical emergencies and repatriation, valid across the whole Schengen area for your full trip duration.
tips: Buy insurance before applying for your visa — the policy is a required document

items.title: Long-Stay / Resident Insurance
items.description: Once resident, you'll typically move to mandatory Belgian health insurance (mutualité/ziekenfonds, e.g. via providers such as Mutualités Chrétiennes/CM, Solidaris or Partenamut) rather than travel insurance.
steps: Register with the municipality to get a national registry number
Choose and enrol with a recognised mutualité/ziekenfonds
Your employer or university can usually recommend a provider
tips: Enrolment is compulsory for residents, not optional — do it soon after registering with your commune
